response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior/staff-level full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role requires a Director-level individual contributor with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. Candidate has roughly 14-16 years of experience depending on counting, but the resume shows no demonstrated AI/ML product leadership, no recognized AI expertise, no advanced degree, and limited cloud-platform strategy work. The profile is mismatched for a Principal/Director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Stripe
Strong engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, open source contributions)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or recognized AI products built
Lacks Principal/Director-level technical leadership or strategy scope
No advanced degree and limited cloud-platform architecture depth

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC scope
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling exposure at Stripe
